instructions: You will see 10 sets of videos. Each set contains 4 videos showing the same person — the leftmost is the Ground Truth (real recording), the other three are different lip-sync model outputs (shown without labels). Watch the videos (they loop, and scrubbing one scrubs all four), then rate the three unlabeled videos on four dimensions. Headphones recommended.

questions.label: Sync
questions.text: How well is the video synced with the audio?

questions.label: Video Quality
questions.text: How is the visual quality of the video?

questions.label: ID Preservation
questions.text: How well does the video preserve the identity of the person across time?

questions.label: Naturalness
questions.text: How natural does the video look?

demographic_questions.question: How familiar are you with audio-driven facial animation / lip-sync technology?
